ab: kumuda u duwa kani?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: kemakawang ku.
en: I came on foot.

ab: muicas u da eman duwa kani?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: muicas ku da bas.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: kumuda u mukuwa i kiyokay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: midusiya i malri, kipuyicas ku kantaw.
en: B: Dad drove me there.

ab: nu yawa i kungkuwan mu, kumuda mukuwa?
ch: A:他要去學校的時候怎麼去?
en: A: How does he get to school when he has to go?

ab: muicas kana ciēyun mukuwa i kungkuwan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: kumuda mukuwa cimima’a da kulang i temu na vavayan?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: miotobay intaw mukuwa cimima’a.
en: B: She went to buy it on a motorcycle.

ab: kumuda u mukuwa i Vuculr?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: yauicas ku da sudang mukuwa i Vuculr.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: kumuda mukuwa i vuculr intaw?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: muicas da hikoki intaw mukuwa i vuculr.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: muicas da eman mukuwa i Takaw intaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: muicas da kawtē intaw mukuwa i Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: muicas da kissiya mukuwa i Valangaw intaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ai, muicas da kissiya mukuwa i Valangaw intaw.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: muicas da Bas mukuwa i Valangaw intaw?
en: A: Did he take the bus to Taitung?

ab: melri, muicas da hikoki mukuwa i Valangaw intaw.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: ulra a ngalangalayan kana bas kani?
en: A: Is there a bus stop here?

ab: ulra, munganguwayan ta kemakawang mu, nana’u ta da ngalangalayan kana bas.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: i iyan na adalrep i kani na ciēyuncan?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: uniyan ciēyuncan i kani a! mawmau na hayya na karuwa ta muicas.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: nu muicas ta kana bas mukuwa i kungkuwan mu, karuwa pidaya tuki?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: nu mukecep lima pungkang raredek i kungkuwan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: nu muicas ta kana kawtē mu, pidaya tuki raredek ta i Tayciyu?
ch: A:如果我們搭高鐵要多久時間我們才會到臺中?
en: A: How long will it take us to get to Taichung if we take the THSR?

ab: saya tuki raredek i Tayciyu.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: sawariyan nu midusiya ta mukuwa i Ulay ?
ch: A:我們若開車去烏來要很久嗎?
en: A: If we drive to Ulai, will it take long?

ab: karuwa saya tuki.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: pidaya tuki nu muicas u kana ciēyun duwa kaniyam?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: karuwa makavuca’an pungkang.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: sayhu u muicas kana dinsiya?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: sayhu ku muicas kana dinsiya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: ulra u otobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ulra ku saya otobay.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: ulriyan nannu otobay?
en: A:Where's your motorcycle?

ab: uniyan ku otobay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
